ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the player's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., admin, player) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the player registered */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., multiplayer, single-player) */,
  "scoring_system" TEXT /* Scoring system used in the game */,
  "game_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played in the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "prize_pool" TEXT /* Total prize pool for the tournament */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of tournament (e.g., online, offline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the team is participating in */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the player left the team (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game result */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played the game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the player in the game */,
  "nd" INTEGER /* ND score of the player in the game */,
  "cu" INTEGER /* CU score of the player in the game */,
  "margin" INTEGER /* Margin of the player in the game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the player in the game */,
  "pb" INTEGER /* PB (personal best) score of the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the tournament */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the team in the tournament */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the team in the tournament */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_standings_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total score of the player in the game */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score of the player in the game */,
  "total_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the player */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score achieved by the player */,
  "lowest_score" INTEGER /* Lowest score achieved by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who received the award */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament where the award was given */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament being sponsored */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament related to the news article */,
  "news_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "news_content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode */,
  "mode_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_modes_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  "rating" REAL /* Player's rating in the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_ratings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_ratings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_ratings_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (win/loss) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_matches_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_matches_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_matches_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
